Container.Name: Shelly-Finance
Container.Overview:
Shelly Finance is a self-hosted personal finance dashboard built for UK investors. Track your accounts (ISA, SIPP, LISA, GIA, pensions), holdings with live prices, monthly budgets, savings goals and retirement projections — all from your own machine. Your data never leaves your network.
Features: live price updates with configurable schedules, custom tags, granular fee tracking, year-by-year and month-by-month projections, Excel export, PWA mobile support, rate-limited login for reverse proxy use.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Shelly Finance web interface.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Where Shelly stores its SQLite database and secret key. Back this up!

Config.Name: Demo Username (read-only)
Config.Description: Username treated as read-only; all writes are blocked for this user.

Config.Name: Enable Public Demo Login
Config.Description: If set to 1, adds a 'Try demo' button on the login page and enables /demo passwordless login for the demo user.
